intro: Coluteastrum stenolobum, also known as the Asian toothcup, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate conditions such as fever and rheumatism.
